overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting two characters resting in a concrete urban underpass. The foreground character smokes and drinks on a bench while a second character sits in the background before departing. The camera transitions from a static view to orbiting around the main character.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete urban underpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: foreground character puts away phone and begins smoking
background character stands up and exits the scene

agents.ego_description: sitting on concrete bench, initially checking phone, then smoking and drinking from a can

notable_agents.action: sitting on secondary bench in background, then stands and walks away at end of segment

entered.detail: solid concrete bench with graffiti on wall behind it
matching concrete bench where background character sits
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
dark tunnel entrance leading to interior space with overhead lighting
discarded beverage cans on ground near main bench

segments.scene_description: In a sunlit concrete underpass, the main character sits on a bench checking their phone before lighting a cigarette. A second character occupies a bench in the mid-ground. The environment features extensive graffiti on the walls and discarded litter. At around 30 seconds, the background character stands up and walks past the foreground character, exiting the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete urban underpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera begins smooth orbital movement around the seated character

agents.ego_description: remaining seated on bench, continuing to smoke as the camera circles around them

segments.scene_description: With the background character now gone, the camera begins orbiting around the main character, revealing different angles of the underpass environment. The character remains seated, smoking casually while the camera captures the graffiti-covered walls and concrete architecture from multiple perspectives. The secondary bench is now empty and visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins as a static observation of a gritty urban underpass that evolves into a dynamic orbital study of a lone figure. It starts with the main character seated on a bench checking their phone and lighting a cigarette, while a second character rests in the mid-ground amidst graffiti-covered walls and scattered litter. As the background character stands and walks past the foreground, exiting the scene, the environment shifts from a shared space to one of isolation. The camera then begins to orbit around the remaining character, sweeping through the concrete architecture to reveal the empty secondary bench and the expansive street art from multiple perspectives. Finally, the movement settles into a continuous rotation, capturing the casual smoking of the character against the stark, sunlit textures of the underpass.
